error.signature: DllNotFoundException: Unable to load DLL 'my_native_plugin': The specified module could not be found
error.regex: (DllNotFoundException|Unable to load DLL|native plugin.*not found|lib.*\.so.*not found|module could not be found)

verdict.summary: Native plugin DLL/SO not found. Wrong platform, wrong architecture, or missing dependencies.

dead_ends.action: Put the DLL in the root Assets folder
dead_ends.why_fails: Unity expects native plugins in Assets/Plugins/{platform}/ with correct import settings

dead_ends.action: Rename the DLL to match a different expected name
dead_ends.why_fails: The DLL name must match the DllImport attribute. Renaming creates a mismatch.

workarounds.action: Place native plugins in the correct platform folder
workarounds.how: Assets/Plugins/x86_64/ for Windows 64-bit; Assets/Plugins/Android/ for Android; set platform in Inspector

workarounds.action: Check plugin Inspector settings for correct platform and CPU
workarounds.how: Select .dll in Unity > Inspector > check 'Any Platform' or specific platforms, set CPU architecture

workarounds.action: Verify all native dependencies are also included
workarounds.how: Use dumpbin /dependents (Win) or ldd (Linux) to check DLL dependencies
